offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual payroll data entry causes cash flow gaps. We provide a payroll data conversion tool instead of manual entry into accounting software.
problem: Manual payroll data entry leads to errors and delays in processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on workflow solutions
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tool sharing
try_it: Let users try user-friendly data input and validation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
